pi_items.source: setup_task.sh (seeds "Quote" tag) and export_result.sh (checks for "[tag[Quote]]" and "[tag[Starred]]" filters)
export_result.sh (checks for exact substrings "<$count", "<$list", "<$checkbox" in the tiddler text)

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the target tiddler title is "Quote Explorer" and that the 10 seeded historical quotes are synthetically injected via setup_task.sh. Confirmed via export_result.sh that the required tags to query are "Quote" and "Starred", and the required widgets to be used in the tiddler are "<$count", "<$list", and "<$checkbox".
